title: Seeded Recursive Backtracking Generation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs seeded recursive backtracking generation from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for seeded iterative and recursive backtracker after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain a current cell, visited set, frontier stack or call path, reciprocal passages, and a progress invariant.
Enumerate in-bounds unvisited neighbors before randomized selection and retain deterministic ordering before shuffling.
Inject and record a dedicated random generator and seed without contaminating global random state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Generation Validation case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review puzzle team handles case 4842 during a low-vision player session. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate seeded backtracking progress, completion, topology, depth, and replay; native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution; then change the seed and retain replay identity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Verify all cells visited, edge count, reciprocal walls, connectivity, acyclicity, seed replay, and changed dimensions.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Reaching the initial cell again proves generation completed correctly.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify all cells visited, edge count, reciprocal walls, connectivity, acyclicity, seed replay, and changed dimensions. Artifact under review: seeded iterative and recursive backtracker.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Generation Validation, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Generation Validation record says seeded iterative and recursive backtracker looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Generation Validation.

For separate evidence from confidence, solve one convenient seeded maze, omit revision, coordinate and wall invariants, topology oracle, frontier trace, changed algorithm or heuristic, callback ownership, keyboard and structured-text access, native Tk evidence, failure, recovery, and package transfer, then accept a screenshot as maze proof. This does not satisfy Generation Validation for seeded iterative and recursive backtracker.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Verify all cells visited, edge count, reciprocal walls, connectivity, acyclicity, seed replay, and changed dimensions.
